use_cases: User registration and account creation for productivity applications
Onboarding new users with email and password authentication
Split-screen signup layout combining branding imagery with a registration form
ai_summary: A modern split-screen sign-up page featuring a gradient dark theme with glass-morphism effects on the left panel for branding imagery, and a clean minimal form on the right for user registration with first name, last name, email, and password fields including terms agreement and password visibility toggle.
